daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Cap. The stars are vibing with your grounded nature, making it the perfect moment to trust your gut and move on something you've been sitting with.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a softness in the air around your heart space. If you've been holding back on vulnerability, today whispers permission to let someone see the real you.
daily.career: Your practical mind is sharp as ever, but don't sleep on creative solutions today. That 'weird idea' you've been lowkey considering might actually hit different if you give it space to breathe.
daily.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Small habits stacked together create momentum—think of it like building the life you want, but for your wellbeing. You've got this.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, but the cosmos is asking you to trust the process instead of controlling every outcome. Something unexpected might shift your perspective in the best way.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is a week to be vulnerable. A conversation you've been avoiding could actually bring relief. If you're single, someone interesting might catch your attention through a shared interest or mutual friend.
weekly.career: Your ideas are gold right now, but maybe hold off on the big pitch until mid-week when cosmic timing is clearer. Collaborative energy is strong—lean into teamwork instead of doing everything yourself. Your future self will thank you.
weekly.health: Your nervous system could use some TLC. Skip the hustle mentality this week and actually rest without guilt. Movement that feels good (not punishing) is your sweet spot. Hydrate more than usual—your body's asking for it.
